name: Desktop UI Shell Refactor
overview: Persist the desktop UI refactor planning docs and pre-drawing specifications before implementation.
content: Home becomes a media-library management page, settings stay separate, language and theme options are intentionally narrowed for v1, and drawing outputs will be generated later into doc/UI/desktop-ui-shell-refactor/ after a drawing MCP is installed.

todolist.content: Keep only desktop-ui-shell-refactor under plan/active and archive the empty completed placeholders
Create the planning, validation, handoff, and implementation docs under plan/active/desktop-ui-shell-refactor
Create stable UI specification docs under doc/UI/desktop-ui-shell-refactor
Generate wireframes and mockups after a drawing MCP is available
Implement the WPF UI refactor after the drawings are reviewed and locked

openQuestions: Whether the icon pipeline should later add a generator that converts manifest entries into IconResources.xaml automatically.
